creator: alp@rsu.ru
text:
Hello.
When I turn dri off in Xorg.conf, this bug goes away. Most applications 
work in fullscreen normally, indeed, without hardware acceleration . I 
submitted bug to bugs.winehq.org:
http://bugs.winehq.org/show_bug.cgi?id=23952

-- 
Best regards,
Alexander Pyhalov,
system administrator of Computer Center of South Federal University
